inputs.value: A high-quality studio photograph of a simple and neat, with exactly 10 to 30 glass pieces physical handcrafted stained glass suncatcher representing a cute little ghost wearing a tall witch's hat, isolated on a plain crisp solid white background. The ghost is made of opalescent white glass, while the witch's hat features deep purple cathedral glass. Constructed from gorgeous pieces of textured translucent colored glass. All glass segments are bound by thick, continuous, smooth dark solder copper foil joints that completely partition the design into closed cells representing real pieces of glass. Designed for realistic physical glass cutting and assembly, with extremely smooth easy-to-cut outlines and no tiny pieces. A vertical structural solder seam connects the base of the ghost's body to the lower edge, and horizontal seams divide the ghost's cape-like arms from its central torso. A dedicated solder seam connects the brim of the hat to the ghost's head, ensuring no floating shapes. The ghost has a friendly, buoyant pose with wide, flowing sleeves. Designed for extremely smooth easy-to-cut outlines, smooth easily-cut solder joints, no narrow shapes, no complex jigsaw lines, realistic glass fabrication template with no impossible sharp inner angles.
